arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney admits he wants former Man United team-mate Danny Welbeck BACK at Old Trafford... after Erik ten Hag's failed summer swoop for the in-form Brighton veteran
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney's comments came after Danny Welbeck scored a crucial winner in the 114th minute after the game went to extra time with 1-1 on the scoresheets.

arts.ttl: 'Remarkable finish' - Fernandes levels for Man Utd
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes levels for Manchester United against Fulham in the FA Cup fifth- round tie.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney sends message to Manchester United players about Rasmus Hojlund

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer issues damning Man Utd verdict during FA Cup clash - 'That sums them up'
arts.sum: Manchester United were moments away from going in level at half-time in their FA Cup but they switched off at a corner to allow their opponents to take the lead

arts.ttl: Bassey reacts quickest to put Fulham ahead
arts.sum: Calvin Bassey puts Fulham ahead in their fifth-round FA Cup tie against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Why Wayne Rooney's successor is at Man United FA Cup tie vs Fulham

arts.ttl: Report: Patrick Dorgu was not Ruben Amorim’s first choice, Inter star derails plans with transfer decision
arts.sum: Federico Dimarco told Manchester United that he was very happy at Inter during the January transfer window. A report from FCInterNews reveals that Ruben Amorim is a huge admirer of the full-back and even attempted to sign him during the January transfer window.
